theory.intro: To add or subtract decimals, line up the decimal points so each place value sits under its match.
facts: **Line up the decimal points** — and the points in the answer line up too.
Fill short numbers with **trailing zeros** so all have the same number of decimal places.
Add or subtract as for whole numbers, carrying or borrowing across the point.
The point in the answer goes directly under the points above.
steps: Write the numbers with decimal points aligned; add trailing zeros to match.
Add or subtract column by column, carrying or borrowing as usual.
Place the decimal point in the answer.
